questions.question: Veteran writer and conservationist Sugathakumari, who recently passed away, was from which state?
questions.explanation: Renowned Malayalam poet, conservationist and women’s rights activist Sugathakumari passed away at the age of 86.The writer has released 15 collections of much-acclaimed poems. Sugathakumari was also the first chairperson of the Kerala State Women Commission and led the launch of Kudumbashree Missions. She had received various awards including the Padma Shri, the Saraswati Samman among others.

questions.question: The Gender Park, which was seen in the news recently, is an autonomous body of which Indian state?
questions.explanation: The Gender Park is an autonomous body under the Kerala state government, organises various projects and programmes on gender equality in the state.Recently, the agency announced that it is set to partner with UN Women to promote women empowerment and function as a South Asia hub for gender equality, in association with the New Delhi based UN Women Multi-Country Office.

questions.question: What is the name of the portal and application launched for booking Government holiday homes and event venues?
questions.explanation: Union Housing and Urban Affairs Minister Hardeep Singh Puri has launched E-Sampada, a new web portal and mobile application.The new application provides a single window for all the services including allotment for Government residential accommodations, space allotment to government and booking of holiday home rooms.

questions.question: The Border Security Force of India is to collaborate with which country to prevent smuggling?
questions.explanation: The Border Security Force (BSF) of India and Border Guard Bangladesh have decided to strengthen joint night vigil, to prevent smuggling. Recently, the countries organized a joint co-ordination conference in Guwahati. Both BSF and BGB have identified the vulnerable regions for night vigil. The countries will also take steps to prevent infiltrations thorough Indo – Bangladesh border.

questions.question: India’s first hot air balloon wildlife safari has been launched in which state?
questions.explanation: India’s first hot air balloon wildlife safari in a tiger reserve has been launched in the Bandhavgarh Tiger Reserve.The Tiger Reserve is situated in the state of Madhya Pradesh. Under the programme, people can watch tigers, leopards, Indian sloth bear and other wild animals from a height, in restricted buffer areas.

questions.question: Nation State Law, which was seen in the news recently, is associated with which country?
questions.explanation: Israel passed its controversial Nation State Law before two years. Recently, the Arab-Israeli citizens and rights groups moved the country’s Supreme Court to scrap these laws.As per the petition, the articles in the law, especially those related to Israel’s official language and land allocation laws, are unconstitutional and are discriminatory towards non-Jewish citizens of the country.

questions.question: Which state has been permitted by the Finance Ministry to borrow Rs 2731 after it achieved ‘Ease of doing business reform?
questions.explanation: The Finance Ministry has recently permitted Rajasthan to borrow an additional Rs 2,731 crore after the state achieved ease of doing business reforms.Rajasthan has now joined the five other states namely, Andhra Pradesh, Karnataka, Madhya Pradesh, Tamil Nadu and Telangana, which were granted additional borrowing permission, through open market borrowings. The borrowing limit of the states was linked to people-centric reforms.

questions.question: Which cricketer has been named the Captain of the ICC’s Men’s T20I and ODI teams of the decade?
questions.explanation: The International Cricket Council (ICC) has recently announced the Men’s T20I and ODI teams of the decade.Former India captain Mahendra Singh Dhoni has been named as the Captain of both the teams. Virat Kohli, Jasprit Bumrah and Rohit Sharma are the other Indians in the T20I team. The ICC’s ODI team also includes Indian batsmen Virat Kohli and Rohit Sharma.

questions.question: Which leading Global Car manufacturer is to start its sale operations in India in 2021, as per the Road Transport Ministry?
questions.explanation: Billionaire Elon Musk’s Electric vehicle manufacturer Tesla is to start selling cars in India in early 2021.This was announced by Nitin Gadkari, Union Minister for Real Transport and Highways. Elon Musk also tweeted about the company’s plans for India. The Company would consider to establish manufacturing and assembly units in India, as per the Minister.

questions.question: Which Indian state has tabled a bill to abolish all state-run Madrassas by converting them into general schools?
questions.explanation: The Assam government recently tabled a Bill in the Legislative Assembly to abolish all state-run Madrassas by converting them into general schools from April 1, 2021.Amid constant objections on tabling the Assam Repealing Bill, 2020, it was placed on the first day of the winter session. There are 610 state-run Madrassas across Assam and the state government is spending Rs 260 crore annually.
